# data/external/

Third-party reference data that isn't produced by our own pipeline — primarily neighborhood/precinct/community-area boundary files (GeoJSON) for Chicago, NYC, and San Francisco, used for both the map visualizations and the geospatial join in the data pipeline.

These files are small enough to commit directly (unlike `data/raw/` and `data/processed/`, which are gitignored).

Populated starting in Milestone 1.
